name: @tenantkit/adapter-supabase
description: Supabase reference adapter for the reservation-core / tenantkit ports — Database, Identity, Session, Authz, Storage. Drop-in: createSupabaseRuntime() → CoreRuntime.
_note: Provisional scope @tenantkit/* = the generic layer-1 kernel (ADR-0009/0010). Kernel ports live in @tenantkit/kernel (currently mocked in packages/reservation-core/src/ports). Resend/Stripe are SEPARATE adapters injected into createSupabaseRuntime().
